title: Sarepta Therapeutics Q1 2026 Earnings Preview - Street Expects $1.05 EPS
text:
Sarepta Therapeutics was expected to report Q1 2026 earnings on May 6, with Street consensus expecting $1.05 EPS and revenue of $475.0 million. The biotech company has seen significant analyst sentiment shifts due to recent regulatory actions and ELEVIDYS performance concerns.

Analyst Expectations for Q1 2026: Consensus EPS estimate: $1.05 per share. Consensus revenue estimate: $475.0 million. These expectations reflected concerns about ELEVIDYS demand following FDA regulatory actions in 2025.

Sentiment Changes: Analyst sentiment had improved dramatically in recent months, with consensus EPS estimate climbing 15.4% over the past 30 days from $0.91 and surging 56.7% over the past 90 days from $0.67. This improvement suggested some recovery in analyst confidence.

Key Business Focus Areas: The commercial portfolio was beginning to stabilize, supported by expanded field engagement and growing body of evidence on ELEVIDYS disease-modifying impact. Company was advancing Cohort 8 of the ENDEAVOR study with sirolimus pretreatment to serve non-ambulatory patients. Company planned to submit supplemental new drug applications to the FDA by end of April.

Regulatory Context: Following FDA actions in 2025, the company was working to address safety concerns and rebuild investor confidence. The regulatory situation remained a key overhang on the stock and analyst sentiment.

Market Conditions: The broader gene therapy market sentiment had been challenged by clinical and regulatory setbacks. Sarepta's ability to navigate these challenges and maintain market position was being closely monitored by analysts and investors.
